mnemonics: Dr. V's C.A.S.E. for Aneka: Christian Vecchiosa's Cloud Application Scheduler Engine for Aneka
keyPoints: Principal Researcher & Project Lead for the Aneka Platform
Expert in Enterprise Cloud Computing & Market-Oriented Cloud
Key contributor to the development of the Aneka container-based PaaS
commonMistakes: Assuming his work is only theoretical; it involves developing the practical Aneka platform
Confusing Aneka with a simple IaaS; it is a PaaS for building distributed applications
Overlooking his focus on market-oriented resource allocation and scheduling algorithms
